title: Unit Economics
shortSummary: CAC, LTV, payback period, and contribution margin — the numbers that tell you whether your business model actually works.
whyItMatters: You can grow revenue fast and still lose money on every customer. Unit economics tell you whether growth creates or destroys value.
coreConcepts: CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost) = total sales and marketing spend / new customers
LTV (Lifetime Value) = average revenue per customer × average lifespan × gross margin
LTV:CAC ratio should be 3:1 or higher — below 1:1 means you lose money per customer
Payback period = how many months until a customer's revenue covers acquisition cost
